description.unified: Throws a spear at the farthest enemy, dealing ??? Physical DMG, pulling them in front of you. Then deals ??? Physical DMG to enemies within range and stuns them for [3 sec->1 sec].
For [15 sec->5 sec], increases own P.Block Chance by [(added) 400]. On Block, deals ??? P.DMG to nearby enemies and reduces their ATK by [20%->22%].

For [(added) 5 sec], increases all allies’ P.Block Chance by [(added) 400] and prepares to leap. While preparing, becomes immune to CC. On Block, increases the leap attack’s DMG by [7%->8%] and deals ??? P.DMG to the attacker. When preparation ends, leaps to the nearest enemy, dealing ??? P.DMG and stuns them for [4 sec->1 sec].
Increases all allies’ P.DEF by ??? and P.Block Chance by [250->120].

IV.unified: Increases the duration of stun by [2 sec->0.5 sec].

light.unified: Mana cost is increased by [1->1000], but pulls in 2 enemies.

dark.unified: Cooldown is reduced by [(added) 2 sec]. [(removed) All pulled enemies take 25% increased DMG from all sources for 10 sec.]

light.unified: Mana cost is reduced by [(added) 1000]. [(removed) Deals extra P.DMG based on P.DEF.]

dark.unified: On cast, increases all allies’ Physical Defense by [20%->15%] for [10 sec->5 sec].
On cast, increases all allies’ Physical DMG reduction by [20%->30%] for [?->5 sec].

light.unified: Physical Defense increase amount increases by [20%->50%]. [(removed) P. Block is boosted by 50%]

dark.unified: Physical Block Chance increases by [(added) 120]. [(removed) Recovers HP equal to 40% of P.DEF upon blocking.]

description.unified: [Will to Win] increases P.Block chance by [(added) 400] and raises the target's P.DMG taken by {0}% for [10 sec->5 sec].
[Steel Fortress] increases DMG Boost on Block by [(added) 24%] and extends the Stun duration of Leap Attack by {0} sec. [(removed) Mana cost is reduced by 1]

[Spearhead] recovers [(added) 40% of P.DEF every sec when blocking], and increases P.DEF gained by [50%->{0}%] for [(added) 5 sec]. P.DEF Boost can stack up to [(added) {4}] times. [(removed) All allies have their P.Crit Resistance increased by {0}]

dark.unified: At the start of each battle, reduces all enemies’ Attack by [20%->15%] for 6 sec. This effect cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: Increases all allies' P.DEF by {0}%. On Block, has a {1}% chance to recover [{2}%->{2}] Mana and reduce the cooldown of all Skills by 1 sec.

Summons the soul of Blue Light, Arpheus for 10sec, increasing P.Block of all allies by [300->{3}] and placing [Mana Source of Blue Light] around self for 10sec. [Mana Source of Blue Light]: Deals ??? P.DMG to enemies within range. When the duration ends, deals ??? P.DMG and silences enemies for [5 sec->3 sec]. [(removed) reduces their Mana by 300, increases P.Crit Resistance by 300]

1.from: Allies within [Mana Source of Blue Light] have their ATK Spd increased by 300 and recover 300 Mana every sec.
1.to: Allies within [Mana Source of Blue Light] recover {2} Mana every sec.
1.unified: Allies within [Mana Source of Blue Light] recover [300->{2}] Mana every sec. [(removed) ATK Spd increased by 300]

2.from: Continuously dispels positive effects placed upon enemies that are within [Mana Source of Blue Light] and changes the duration of Silence to 8 sec.
2.to: Changes the Silence duration applied at the end of [Mana Source of Blue Light] to 4.5 sec.
2.unified: Changes the Silence duration applied at the end of [Mana Source of Blue Light] to [8 sec->4.5 sec]. [(removed) Continuously dispels positive effects placed upon enemies]
